tasks.label: Graded assignment — 90% done, submit when finished

memory.summary: With only ten percent left and no other deadlines looming, I can finish this assignment in time without sacrificing anything else. This confirms my focus should remain strictly on completing the task efficiently.
The missing task file contradicts my earlier confidence; I must verify the professor's instructions before proceeding further.

The deadline passed while I was still 5% away from completion, proving my earlier confidence was dangerously misplaced. This failure forces me to immediately renegotiate the terms with the professor rather than assuming flexibility.
The assignment is 99% complete, yet the missing file and past deadline failure mean I cannot simply submit. I must immediately renegotiate with the professor to avoid a zero.

desires: Force the professor to acknowledge my renegotiated deadline immediately so I can submit the 99% complete work without a zero.
Re-establish my reputation as reliable and competent after the missed submission, preventing future skepticism from the faculty.
Stop spiraling into anxiety about the outcome and execute the communication plan with precise, assertive clarity.

goals.description: Submit the assignment immediately at 98.77% completion to secure a passing grade, then immediately execute the direct renegotiation with prof_assignment to clarify the timeline and restore my professional credibility.
goals.rationale: My achievement value dictates that securing the outcome now is superior to waiting for marginal perfection; my assertive conflict style requires me to address the credibility breach head-on before it festers into permanent skepticism. Delaying violates my deliberate planning horizon by risking total failure on this task.
